issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Route high-value orders to a Lambda with a DLQ
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines AWS::Events::EventBus + AWS::Events::Rule with EventPattern using numeric matcher [{ "numeric": [">=", 1000] }] and Targets DeadLetterConfig; baseline uses ad-hoc CloudFormation without the documented numeric matcher or per-target DLQ structure.

scenarios.name: Publish OrderCreated events and transform for analytics target
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses PutEventsCommand with Source/DetailType/Detail/EventBusName entries plus an InputTransformer with InputPathsMap and InputTemplate as shown; baseline calls the SDK but omits InputTransformer reshaping and uses default bus.
